mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message ( session_id, turn_id, turn_seq, role, content, metadata, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{sessionId}, #{turnId}, #{turnSeq}, #{role}, #{content}, CAST(#{metadata} AS jsonb), #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id, turn_id, turn_seq, role, content, metadata::text AS metadata, seq_no, turn_completed, created_at, updated_at FROM chat_message WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)

SELECT id, session_id, turn_id, turn_seq, role, content, metadata::text AS metadata, seq_no, turn_completed, created_at, updated_at FROM chat_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY seq_no ASC

SELECT id, session_id, turn_id, turn_seq, role, content, metadata::text AS metadata, seq_no, turn_completed, created_at, updated_at FROM ( SELECT id, session_id, turn_id, turn_seq, role, content, metadata, seq_no, turn_completed, created_at, updated_at FROM chat_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY seq_no DESC LIMIT #{limit} ) recent ORDER BY seq_no ASC

SELECT id, session_id, turn_id, turn_seq, role, content, metadata::text AS metadata, seq_no, turn_completed, created_at, updated_at FROM chat_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND seq_no > #{startExclusiveSeqNo} AND seq_no <= #{endInclusiveSeqNo} ORDER BY seq_no ASC
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT turn_id) FROM chat_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND role = 'USER'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM chat_message WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
mapper.update:
UPDATE chat_message
session_id = #{sessionId},
turn_id = #{turnId},
turn_seq = #{turnSeq},
role = #{role},
content = #{content},
metadata = CAST(#{metadata} AS jsonb),
turn_completed = #{turnCompleted},
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
